About the House

TREND bro is a menswear shop out of Nellore City, Andhra Pradesh, stocking everything from Rare Rabbit formals to in-house dip-dye originals and streetwear drops. No two ombre shirts come out the same — that's the point.

🚚 All India Delivery 📍 Nellore City, AP ✔ Branded Collabs
